    H

    handleKeyPress(KeyEvent, boolean, boolean) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler
    Handles key press events for both single and multiplayer modes.
    handleKeyRelease(KeyEvent, boolean) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler
    Handles key release events, primarily for resetting soft drop rate when the soft drop key is released.
